calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Progressive Marathon Insurance Company as Subrogee of Richard Fulton.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Virgilio Gonzales as follows:
Damages of $35,277.37
Prejudgment interest $8,375.64
Costs of $386.50
For the total of $44,039.51
Judgment signed in open court.
